title: Copper Items
description: A simple plugin that adds fully craftable items from copper with textures.
body:
# **News**:
 - Discord server now **fixed**! (You can join now)
 - **Commands and config** is present now!
 - **Multi-languages** support!
# **Summary**:

More info: [**Wiki**](https://github.com/GreeFoxTheDev/Copper-Items/wiki), [**Discord server**](https://discord.gg/tXJcWx92HM)

Copper Items aims on adding more usability to copper. Why should copper be a new ore without any potential?
This plugin adds basic tools and armour to the game, all can be seen in list below.

# **Items added:**

 - Copper Sword
 - Copper Axe
 - Copper Pickaxe
 - Copper Shovel
 - Copper Hoe

# **Armour added:**

 - Copper Helmet
 - Copper Chestplate
 - Copper Leggings
 - Copper Boots

![This is an image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DDB2lppa/images/64211f329a5c208464282de1343b0d3d90891f07.png)

## **Planned:**

 - Items and some armour from crystals
 - Add oxidation based on durability (texturepack) - **done**

## **Texturepack:**

 - [My Plugin Resourcepack]([https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/copper-items-resource](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/my-plugins-resource-pack/version/fhaUOQi4)
 - **No longer needs** Optifine or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)

## **Commands and config**
 - GIve command: `/givecopperitem <item> <player>`
 - Config: 
![This is an image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/52uRwnTq/images/f113a51a8e390f8dbf2cc79834bc2570f816d6f4.png)


## **Installation guide:**

 - Get the .jar file in 'plugins' folder
 - You're done!
 - Check out the [Wiki](https://github.com/GreeFoxTheDev/Copper-Items/wiki) and [Discord server](https://discord.gg/tXJcWx92HM)

## **FAQ**

 - **What about the texturepack?**
   - It's downloaded automatically, you don't have to worry about it!
